text:
Four business days past the 1-3 window on a $500 ACH deposit is worth a direct look — I can't confirm from here whether it failed or is just delayed, so I'm flagging this to our payments ops team to check the actual status.

Send the last 4 digits of the account you deposited from and roughly when you submitted it, and they'll track it down and follow up with what they find.

Novig Support
